act_name: The Value Added Tax and Supplementary Duty Act
section_title: Change in jurisdiction for recovery of arrear tax.—Where a defaulting
content:
97. Change in jurisdiction for recovery of arrear tax.—Where a defaulting
taxpayer resides in, or has an economic activity or a property within, the jurisdiction of
any other Commissioner, the Commissioner may make a request to such other
Commissioner to recover the arrear tax, and such Commissioner shall, on such request,
recover the arrear tax in such a manner as if the tax were an arrear in his jurisdiction.
